entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `filename` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT, `description` TEXT, `path` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdTimestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `fileSize` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pageCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `thumbnail` TEXT)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT, `description` TEXT, `filename` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`scanned_documents`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_scanned_documents_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `scanned_documents` BEGIN DELETE FROM `scanned_documents_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_scanned_documents_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `scanned_documents` BEGIN DELETE FROM `scanned_documents_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_scanned_documents_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `scanned_documents` BEGIN INSERT INTO `scanned_documents_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `description`, `filename`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`description`, NEW.`filename`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_scanned_documents_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `scanned_documents` BEGIN INSERT INTO `scanned_documents_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `description`, `filename`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`description`, NEW.`filename`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '3431aed1f5c9010e0d3bde47a9b2ce92')
